eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Apache, AZ; at 02:57 PM ON MAY 13, 2026 Effective until 06:57 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: EMERGENCY: All areas within a half a mile County Road #4 2040 Alpine, AZ have been moved to SET due to a fire in the area. Please be prepared in the event of evacuations. Please be prepared in the event of evacuations.
